content: Create a new address book and add the 20 contacts (by drag and drop), then make a filter with the rule From + is in my address book + <name of new book>. Add new contacts to the book by clicking the star in the message header, twice, to select the target book.
creator: sfhowes

creator: Bartholo

content:
When you reset your Windows PC, you delete your files.

So, even when you reinstall Thunderbird - the emails where on the PC/ OS you have reseted, when you was using POP3.

So maybe you or your email provider has a backup - that's the only way.

Or when you didn't used POP3, than your email are still on the server of your provider. Look on his Help-Page for a contact form or email-address. He'll need to know your email-address and maybe some further information, like customer number or else.

The alternative would be to complicate to explain here in simple words.

Hope I was helpful (and I'm sorry about your old emails)
creator: derNorden
